media_storage.metadata_model: Each GBP-ready asset and screenshot has a .metadata.json sidecar plus macOS xattrs for client, domain, capture date, source, service intent, local SEO keywords, AI SEO entities, and recall tags.
google_best_practices_applied: Complete and accurate business information for relevance.
Keep hours accurate; separate 24/7 dispatch from office/vehicle-release hours.
Use real, well-lit JPG/PNG photos between 10 KB and 5 MB with at least 250x250 resolution; 720x720 or higher preferred.
Use service-specific photos, exterior/interior/team/logo/cover images, reviews/replies, and fresh posts to support prominence and conversion.

Removed broad legal/competitor keywords from global metadata.
Updated AI citation metadata with the dispatch vs vehicle-release distinction.
Changed shared header/footer 24/7 wording to dispatch-specific language.
Set comparison-style pages to noindex, follow pending rewrite or retirement.
